title: tarenna elongata
intro: Tarenna elongata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the elongated tarenna. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. Tarenna elongata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including infections, wounds, and digestive issues.
